response.justification: Strong technical IC with recent agentic-AI exposure at Google, but critically lacking in all three executive dimensions: no evidence of leading engineering teams at scale (10-30+), zero fintech infrastructure experience, and no track record in regulated environments. Current agentic work (3 months in) is too recent to demonstrate production proficiency. This is a mid-level technical engineer, not a CTO-track candidate.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with agentic frameworks and MCP infrastructure at Google showing current awareness of AI-agent systems
Proven ability to architect distributed systems: event-driven platforms, microservices, and real-time data handling at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Strong teaching and mentoring background (workshops, courses, open-source libraries) demonstrating communication and technical depth
concerns: Zero fintech infrastructure experience despite role requiring credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance, and risk-management architecture
No evidence of leading/scaling engineering teams; resume shows individual-contributor progression only (missing hard requirement of scaling 10-30+ people)
Agentic AI production experience limited to 3 months at Google with no demonstrated operating maturity, failure-mode handling, or production observability design

key_factors.factor: Complete absence of fintech domain knowledge
Only 3 months of agentic AI production exposure
